parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  jobId: $json.jobId,
  status: $json.status,
  message: $json.message,
  progress: 100,
  executionId: $execution.id,
  finalVideoUrl: $json.finalVideoUrl || '',
  shortVideoUrl: $json.shortVideoUrl || '',
  thumbnailUrl: $json.thumbnailUrl || '',
  youtubeUrl: $json.youtubeUrl || '',
  outputs: $json.outputs
} }}
